nasb.text: ‘When a leader sins and unintentionally does any one of all the things which the Lord his God has commanded not to be done, and he becomes guilty,

esv.text: “When a leader sins, doing unintentionally any one of all the things that by the commandments of the Lord his God ought not to be done, and realizes his guilt,

cnv.text: “如果領袖無意犯了罪，行了一件耶和華他的　神吩咐不可行的事，他就有罪。

ccb.text: “首领若无意中触犯他的上帝耶和华的诫命，也是犯罪。
